description_long: This object is a rustic wooden directional sign composed of two horizontally mounted, irregularly cut wooden planks attached to a single, natural-looking vertical wooden post. The planks are weathered and uneven, giving the sign a handmade, organic appearance. A small green leaf sprouts from the upper part of the post, adding a touch of natural detail. The wood grain and texture are visible, with the planks slightly warped and not perfectly aligned. The sign lacks any visible text or symbols, making it a blank template for custom directions. The overall construction suggests it is intended for outdoor use, possibly in parks, trails, or natural urban green spaces.
description: A rustic, handmade wooden directional sign with two uneven planks mounted on a single post and a small green leaf detail. The sign is blank and weathered, suitable for outdoor or park settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing both wooden planks clearly, with the post and a small green leaf visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the planks and post, with the leaf protruding slightly from the post.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the planks and post, with the leaf still visible and the irregular plank edges apparent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the depth of the sign and the alignment of the planks relative to the post.
